name: Talleres – Enriquecer con Google Places Details

parameters.query:
SELECT id, external_id, name
FROM workshop_locations
WHERE is_active = true
  AND source = 'google'
  AND external_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (enriched_at IS NULL OR enriched_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 300

nodes.name: Code: Parsear respuesta y generar SQL
